title: backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
author: Nabsku

findings.description: Bypass condition uses both !IsKubernetesResourceAPIPath and !IsAuthBypassURL joined with ||. The logic is correct but non-obvious; a brief comment explaining the dual intent would aid future readers.
kubernetesAPIPathIndex cleanly consolidates the duplicated index-detection logic from GetAPIGroup and ExtractNamespace, reducing future drift.
TestCacheMiddleware_BypassesNonKubernetesAPIPaths uses a full router harness and asserts X-HEADLAMP-CACHE header absence, giving strong end-to-end confidence.
TestIsKubernetesResourceAPIPath covers all four valid path forms plus two expected-false cases, providing full predicate coverage.
